name: Red Pine Exploration Inc.
description: Red Pine Exploration Inc. is a Canadian gold development company headquartered in Toronto, focused on advancing the Wawa Gold Project in Ontario. The company is transitioning from exploration success to mine development, with its flagship project located 2 km southeast of the Town of Wawa in Northern Ontario. Supported by an experienced management and technical team, Red Pine Exploration is dedicated to building a future Canadian gold producer, leveraging its 100% owned Wawa Gold Project located in the Michipicoten Greenstone Belt to drive long-term value for stakeholders.
